title: sapium glandulatum
intro: Sapium glandulatum, also known as the Putat or Mimusops, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sapium glandulatum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection, making it a valuable remedy for various skin conditions and injuries. Sapium glandulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, ointments, and infusions, which can be applied topically to affected areas or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
